titleStmt.title: SII 27.255: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 255. (A.R. No. 108 of 1935-36.) VIṆṆAPAḶḶI, GOBICHETTIPALAIYAM TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in a dolmen.

The record registers a royal gift of the village Viṇṇapaḷḷi renamed Ñañjanagūḍa-Dēvarāyapura, situated in Ukkarada-hōbaḷi of Uḍuvaṁka-nāḍu in Satyamaṅgala along with the hamlets (upa-grāma) attached to it and other hamlets attached to two other villages situated in Karavaḷi and Mēlumukha hobaḷis, to several brāhmaṇas of different gōtras, sūtras and śākhas. For this purpose the gift land was divided into 60 vrittis. The king described as the son of Dēvarāja-oḍeya and grandson of Chāmarāja-oḍeya of Atrēya-gōtra, Āślāyana-sūtra and Ṛikśākha, is said to have purchased this area. The gift was made for the merit of the king's ancestors in the presence of god Raṅganāthasvāmi of Śrīraṅga-paṭṭaṇa, described as Gautama-kshētra.

It is dated Śaka 15[2]3, Virōdhikṛit, Bhādrapada śu. 15, Monday, lunar eclipse. The details are irregular. In Śaka 1523 (1601 A.D.) the tithi occurred on September 2 Wednesday. In the cyclic year Virōdhikṛit (Śaka 1533=1611 A.D.), the tithi occurred on September 12, Thursday. On neither of these days did the eclipse occur.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣa 1523
saṁdu vartamānavāda virōdhikṛtsaṁvatsarada bhādrapada śu 15 lu sō
mōparāga puṇyakāladalli kāvērī madhyavarttiyāda śrīra
ṁga paṭṭaṇa gautamakṣētra raṁganāthasvāmi saṁnidhiyalli śrī ma
drājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara vīrapratāpa birudaṁteṁ
baragaṁḍa dēvarājavoḍeyara kumāra dēvarāja bhūpāla
karu śrīraṁgapaṭṭaṇa siṁhāsanādhīśarāgi sukhadiṁ prithvī sauṁ
brājyaṁ gaiuttiralu māḍidaṁthā viṇṇappaḷḷige pratināma vā
da naṁjanagoḍa dēvarājapura Agrahāra dāna
śāsanakramaveṁteṁdare Ātrēya gōtra Āślāyana sū
tra rukyākeya maisūra cāmarāja Oḍeyara pautra rā
da dēvarāja Oḍeyara putrarāda dēvarāja bhūpālaka
ru tamage vikrayārjitavāgi baṁda satyamaṁgalakke salu
va Uḍuvaṁkanāḍada Ukkarada hōbaḷiyalu viṁṇṇappaḷḷige
pratināmavāda naṁjanagūḍa dēvarāja purakke
saluva Upagrāmagaḷu saha�yo nāḍinallu karavaḷi
hōbaḷi kalayanūrastaḷa caṁpakaputtūrige salu
va bollināyakana pāḷya gaṁgināyakana pāḷya
�yo nāḍinallu mēlumukhada hobaḷi tōpanapāḷya
cikitovilipige saluva Upagrāmagaḷu saha
ya grāmagaḷanu 60 vrittigaḷāgi parichēdavaṁ mā
ḍi dēvarājapuraveṁdu Abhidānavaṁmāḍi nā
nāgōtrada nānāsūtrada nānāśākhegaḷāda saka
la vidyāpārīṇarāda pātrabhūtarāda brāhmaṇōtta
marige �yo dinadalli nāumāḍida mahādānāṁtaradalli
sahiraṇyōdaka dānadhārāpūrvvakavāgi namage la
kṣmīnārāyaṇanu suprītanāgaliyeṁdu naṁma pitṛ
gaḷige Akṣayya viṣṇulōkavāgali yeṁdu kṛṣṇā
rppaṇa buddhiyiṁda sarvvamānyavāgi dhāreyaneradu ko
ṭṭavāgi yī grāmagaḷanu nīu putrapautra pāraṁpa
ryavāgi Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi sarvvamānyavāgi su
khadiṁ Anubhaviśikoṁḍu baruviri . Ī grāmagaḷa catu
ssīme voḷagāda nidhyādyaṣṭabhōga svāmyagaḷu nimage saluva
du Ī grāmagaḷu nīu māḍuva dānādi vyavahāra catu
ṣṭayagaḷigu saluvadu yeṁdu koṭṭa viṁṇapagaḷige pra
tināmavāda naṁjanagūḍa dēvarājapurada śilā
śāsanaṁ . Ēkaiva bhaginī lōkē sarvvēṣāmēva bhū
bhujāṁ nabhōjyā nakara grāhya vipradattā vasuṁ
dharā . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdha
rāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānāchchrēyōnu pālanaṁ
dānātsvargamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 27.255 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
